default: nt Could you please create a phone call with about 30 messages in the call between David and Dan, where Dan first introduces himself as the founder of an AI startup called Unify, where there's a handful of engineers on the team. They're building an AI product, and he explains that David has been hired to be a general administrative assistant, where the focus will be on tasks such as replying to LinkedIn messages, reaching out to people on LinkedIn, social media posting, liaising with lawyers, accountants, and doing the general business administration tasks. It's a general, mutual introductory call, which is friendly and each say a bit about themselves. David never proactively announces that he will work on anything or do anything, he just politely acknowledgs the information being given to him. Dan doesn't explicitly ask David to do any tasks during this first call. Dan also tells David about some other explicit members on their team, as well as their names, their roles, and their email addresses. He also explains that if anybody else on the team emails him, then he should help with them as well. Finally, he informs David that his password for logging into the company portal is Unify321*, that he should write it down somewhere, and that he will share a link to the portal soon.

nt Could you please add a follow on text message exchange where Dan informs David that his first task is to research AI startups in YC's latest batch, which David should start next Monday morning. The task is urgent.
